column3: Sour Branding (Submit BEFORE eating the candy)
column8: What type of graph do you think would best represent the flavor of this candy?

column7: It was okay. I’m not a huge sour fan so I could sit and eat a bunch of these.
Too big of a candy, I made sure to eat it all at once to avoid increasing the sour duration that comes from eating the second half, halfway through.
Sour is through whole candy, not just in coating
Ok but more like Haribo not very sour
